meta.title: Project 0: The Largest DeFi Prime Broker, Only Possible on Solana

transcript: Hi everyone, uh, thanks for coming out. My name is MacBrennan Peet. I'm the founder of uh Project Zero. In this in this uh little talk I'm going to give you a snapshot of what Project Zero is, uh, where we're headed and make three major announcements. So, we launched in September, we're relatively new, uh, despite that we have about 300 million dollars in our systems, we've grown by 60 million dollars over the last three months. Uh, and that is normalized for crypto prices today. As we all know crypto prices recently took about a 50% dip, um, so that's normalized for that that dip as well. So pretty decent growth. Um, however, we've only started with two venues thus far. We have Kamino live and P0 live and we have three markets live on Kamino. Uh, so as we start to add more venues, think like Drift, Jupiter, Loopscale, uh, and more, I expect this growth uh to to pick up quite dramatically. You might be thinking, okay, prime broker, I've heard it, I've heard it tried on in crypto but nothing's ever worked. Um, why now? Uh, I think there's two major catalysts for this. One, you need a blockchain that is fast, efficient, cheap, a really good execution layer. Um, and Solana is the only blockchain at scale that this works with. If you tried to cross-margin uh derivatives on like Ethereum for example, it would be very, very difficult. Um, number two is venues now have staying power and they're starting to win their their their niches of the market. Um, Kamino was our first integration, Drift is done, we're working on Jupiter Lend. These are venues that I know are going to be here a year from now, they're providing unique functionality to the end user, and so uh you can make this bet now. Um, we're very focused on the yield segment of DeFi, less so the trading segment of DeFi. So what that means is right now, for the first time ever in crypto, uh people are running multi-venue unified uh rate trades and carry trades. To break that down that means a user is lending into Kamino for example and achieving maybe a 7% rate on a stablecoin and they're borrowing against that lent position on Project Zero at maybe like a 5% rate and capturing that 2% delta and they're able to lever that up for more. Um, we're going to stick here as we start to add derivatives as well. I'm very interested in uh basis trades think with like perps and interest rate derivatives. A good example of that would be uh short the perp on Drift, long the spot on Jupiter Lend, capture that basis, lever it up. Uh, this will be possible through Project Zero. It wasn't in a generalized sense before. Um, and we already have live on the product now the rate side and carry carry side of that. Uh, our first major announcement today is Project Zero Pay. Now when you see a pay product, um, you probably have something in your mind. It's not what you're thinking. So, Project Zero Pay is not a new credit card, it's not a new bank account, it's not a new DeFi venue that you need to move to in order to use it, it's not something that stops you from earning yield, and it is not something that stops you from earning the crypto exposure you want if you're long Bitcoin or Solana for example. What it is, is connective backend infrastructure that now utilizes the prime brokerage connective tissue we've built so that you can have lent positions with the exposure you want in the products you want. Uh, you can take out a borrow at the end of the month against this entire portfolio, it can pay your account that is paying your credit cards, you can still earn your Amex points, you you don't need a new uh Chase account. Um, and this is live for signup now, it's going live in January. Uh, number two is the the next big announcement is our risk engine, it's called Brutus. Um, the this is powering our production variables for spot assets right now. Next year we're going to make it fully dynamic. That means real-time updating of LTVs, rates, caps, on-chain in response to market conditions. And Brutus V2 will go live and add uh on on once we add derivatives. So Brutus V2 will add essentially derivative risk systems to our spot risk systems that are live today, that will also go live next year, but this is already powering our on-chain production risk variables. Uh, the last big announcement is uh the Project Zero token. So in order to get the Project Zero token live, we needed uh majority market share of lending venues on Solana, we needed the Pay product live, and we need the Strategies product live. Um, the Strategies product for those paying attention went live last month. This is a innovative new tooling where you can run these multi-venue uh carry trades in one click, that's live on the app right now. Pay as as just announced uh is going to be going live in January. Um, Kamino's in production, Drift is done, Drift is going live in January, Jupiter Lend is being worked on, it's going live first half of Q1. So that means the Project Zero token uh is aiming for uh Q1 of next year. And that is going live importantly before uh derivatives, which we expect to be our biggest growth opportunity, that's like Drift perps, exponent rate uh interest rate products, RateX, etcetera. Uh, and that's it. So, um, if uh if you're using two or more venues today in Solana DeFi, product Project Zero might give you better risk, better rates, better capital efficiency, better UX. It should. If we don't have your integrated venue, uh please, you know, reach out to us or the team, we'd we'd love to work with you. Um, and uh I'm excited for the the coming year. Thank you.

enrichment.generated_query: Project Zero Pay Project Zero Solana Breakpoint 2025 official announcement blog OR technical docs

![Post Headliner Image](https://images.ctfassets.net/kcejkz5ssx6z/1KzIP0XchP644Mhs7dkmq9/e6a8eb89f431d9f22e78aa34baa8c356/Article_Image_Announcements.svg)
Kraken, an exchange with over 15M+ clients and $207B quarterly volume, is standardizing wrapped Bitcoin with LayerZero’s OFT, ensuring $kBTC is compatible with all blockchains -- fungible and composable across crypto.
[X Announcement here](https://x.com/LayerZero_Core/status/1996618258066411820?s=20).
**kBTC: Bitcoin, Everywhere**
kBTC has recently experienced significant growth, with its market cap increasing fivefold since the start of December to nearly $170M today, underscoring strong market demand for trusted, institutionally backed assets pegged to bitcoin. kBTC is live today on Optimism, Ink, Unichain, and Ethereum, with Kraken now able to expand to any of the 150+ blockchains LayerZero supports.
By choosing LayerZero and integrating the OFT Standard, Kraken ensures that 1 kBTC equals 1 kBTC on every blockchain it deploys to, turning Bitcoin from a static asset into one that is portable and composable across ecosystems. This lets users move Bitcoin between any connected chain with zero slippage and Kraken-level security.
*“Kraken began by giving people a trusted place to buy Bitcoin. kBTC is the next step —issuing Bitcoin onchain and unifying it across many blockchains, unlocking utility and enabling more use cases than ever before.”*- Bryan Pellegrino, CEO of LayerZero Labs
*“With LayerZero’s OFT Standard, Bitcoin becomes truly omnipresent onchain —seamlessly moving across ecosystems. This marks a pivotal step toward unifying liquidity and unlocking native Bitcoin utility everywhere.” –Calvin Leyon, Head of Onchain at Kraken*
**Interoperability for Bitcoin**
Bitcoin is a $2 trillion asset that cannot natively interact with smart contracts. To make BTC usable in DeFi, teams began tokenizing it, locking Bitcoin on its native chain and issuing equivalents on other networks. Wrapped Bitcoin made BTC usable as collateral, liquidity, and settlement across DeFi, powering billions in onchain markets.
Before this upgrade, wrapped versions of bitcoin were fragmented and chain-specific, each with separate liquidity and integrations, similar to how dollars in payment apps are not composable.
Kraken’s integration of LayerZero’s OFT Standard unifies bitcoin across chains into a single asset. The OFT Standard is a smart contract framework that allows tokens to exist natively across multiple blockchains without wrapping or bridging. For Kraken, this means kBTC can be made available securely across blockchains while maintaining a single unified supply.
* For developers and applications, kBTC can function as collateral, a payment instrument, or a savings asset on any blockchain, all backed by unified liquidity.
* For users, kBTC on Ink can be transferred between Ink, Optimism, Unichain, and Ethereum with zero slippage.
**Strengthening the Crypto Economy**
Founded in 2011, Kraken is one of the longest-standing and most trusted cryptocurrency exchanges in the world.
The company has helped shape the foundation of today’s digital asset markets by combining deep liquidity, security, and a long-term approach to building. Kraken offers spot and futures trading, staking, and custody services to mi

Today marks an important milestone for Stable and for the broader stablecoin economy. Stable Mainnet is officially live, activating StableChain, our USDT-native Layer 1 designed for high-volume, predictable stablecoin settlement.
This moment represents more than a technical release: it is the beginning of dedicated infrastructure for the stablecoin economy. As we move into this next phase, we want to outline the thesis that guides our work and the role StableChain will play in shaping the future of digital value movement.
Learn more about StableChain:[www.stable.xyz](http://www.stable.xyz)
## **Stable Thesis, Why Stable?**
With Stable Mainnet going live today, we are entering an important moment for both Stable and the broader stablecoin economy. Mainnet marks the point where dedicated stablecoin infrastructure moves from concept to reality, and with it, the opportunity to redefine how stable value moves across the world.
Stablecoins have become one of the world’s most widely adopted digital assets, yet the infrastructure that carries them has not evolved at the pace of their usage. They are used globally, across industries and economies, but they still rely on base layers built for purposes other than payments.
This gap is no longer sustainable.
Stable’s mission is to deliver dedicated payment infrastructure designed around how stablecoins are actually used: to move value quickly, reliably, and with predictable costs. With StableChain, we are advancing that mission: providing a foundation where stablecoin transactions are not secondary activity, but the core function of the system.
Stable Mainnet represents the beginning of this new phase.
**Fast, Secure, Predictable.**
## **Growing Ecosystem of Day-1 Partners**

## Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform
December 4, 2025
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f08e5798eed50/693023e13e4b72ada17e0fe2_2025-12-03%2017.19.13.jpg)
[
Contents

Contents
](#)

](https://twitter.com/driftprotocol)[
](https://discord.com/invite/fMcZBH8ErM)
[
Trade Now
](https://app.drift.trade/)
![]()
![]()
Drift v3 is the protocol’s biggest performance upgrade yet. Rebuilt around trader execution, v3 delivers**10x faster fills, 10x improved liquidity, and a cleaner, more intuitive interface**than v2.
This upgrade was built for one thing: outperformance. Instant execution. Deeper liquidity. A suite of tools that helps you trade faster and with more confidence.
Drift v2 was the first to bring cross-margin and multi-asset collateral to DeFi on-chain trading. We built on Solana to deliver NASDAQ-level performance on-chain and with major Solana upgrades like Alpenglow, Firedancer and Jito’s Block Assembly Market (BAM), Drift is built to outperform as the network scales.
Since launch, Drift has surpassed 1.5B in TVL, $133B+ in total trading volume and $650M in open interest. Drift v3 is built to take those numbers and your trading even further.
**Drift v3 will be available on Dec 4, 2025.**New users will need an invite code to access Drift v3.
**DM**[**@DriftProtocol**](https://x.com/DriftProtocol)**to request access.**
## Why v3?
Drift v3 represents the protocol’s next stage of maturity: the point where years of infrastructure, liquidity, and execution improvements converge into a faster, clearer, more reliable trading experience.
**Over the past year, Drift has evolved in three critical areas:**
1. Execution speed
2. Liquidity depth
3. Trader experience## How Drift v3 outperforms
*The road to v3 was focused on improving liquidity, trading execution and speed. Here’s what that looks like in practice:*
### **Trading Execution and Speed**
* **10x faster order fills:**On Drift v3, 85% of market orders are filled within the same slot. A slot is Solana’s smallest time unit (about 400 milliseconds). On Drift, that means that trades are executed in under half a second. Instant execution.
* **15x faster take profit/stop loss triggers:**For BTC, it dropped from 15 slots (\~6 seconds) to 1 slot (\~0.4 seconds). This means your risk controls and exits now trigger immediately, reducing slippage and missed opportunities.
* **Gasless trading by default:**Unlike other DEXs, where you pay gas on every trade, Drift abstracts gas fees so that’s one less thing to worry about eating into profits
* **400ms oracle updates**: Prices update every 400 millisecond (roughly 2.5 times per second). This keeps quotes accurate and reduces the chance of stale pricing.
* **Scales with Solana:**As Solana increases block size and throughput, Drift automatically gets faster too, handling more trades per second.### **Liquidity**
* **10x reduction in slippage on market orders:**In Drift v2, large market orders could move the price by 20 bps. In v3, that’s been cut to just 2 bps. Traders now get far better pricing, especially on size.
* **5x tighter TP/SL execution:**Take-profit and stop-loss orders are far more precise. On major markets like SOL and BTC, fills are 4x tighter, while non-majors see up to 5x improvement. This means exits trigger closer to the price you set, reducing losses and protecting gains.
* **Introduction of Drift Liquidity Provider (DLP)**: Provides liquidity for both Perps and Spot markets. Community members can deposit funds into DLP to support market-making and earn a share of the pool's profits. Currently in the testing stage. Public launch in Q1 2026.
* **Expanded Market Maker Program:**With v3’s expanded market maker initiatives, long-tail altcoins now hav

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a complex crystal prism as the 'Semantic Anchor' because it perfectly visualizes the core function of Project 0: a prime brokerage that takes multiple, disparate inputs (DeFi venues like Kamino, Drift, Jupiter) and unifies them into a single, more efficient output ('unified margin'). The light beams represent the flow of capital and data. For the homepage text, I chose '$300M' from the standfirst as it's a high-impact number representing the project's successful launch scale. I integrated it as a holographic projection to maintain a futuristic, diegetic aesthetic in line with the 'Wired Magazine' style.

Several distinct beams of colored light, representing different DeFi protocols, enter the prism from various angles. The light refracts and merges within the crystal's intricate interior, exiting as a single, brilliant, unified beam of white light. Emanating from a facet of the prism is a soft, glowing holographic projection displaying the text '$300M'. The background is deep and atmospheric, with out-of-focus server racks and glowing data conduits adding a sense of scale and network complexity.

The light intensely refracts and merges within the crystal's intricate, hyper-detailed interior, showcasing internal reflections and chromatic dispersion, rendered with ray-traced optics and physically based rendering. Exiting as a single, brilliant, unified beam of pristine white light, cutting through the ambient gloom. The background is deep and atmospheric, with out-of-focus server racks and glowing data conduits adding a sense of immense scale, network complexity, and abstract tech aesthetic. editorial.headline: Project 0 Unveils Solana’s First True Prime Broker at Breakpoint
editorial.standfirst: Founder MacBrennan Peet announces unified margin across Kamino, Drift, and Jupiter, solving DeFi’s capital efficiency crisis with a $300M launch.
key_takeaways: $300M TVL achieved in just three months following the September 2025 launch.
Project 0 Pay and native Token confirmed for Q1 2026 release.
Cross-venue integrations with Drift (Jan) and Jupiter (Q1) will enable institutional basis trades.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
At Solana Breakpoint 2025, **Project 0** founder MacBrennan Peet outlined a thesis that institutional investors have long waited for: a functional, decentralized prime broker. While attempts at cross-margining have faltered on Ethereum due to latency and cost, Peet argues that Solana’s execution layer is the only environment capable of supporting a generalized prime brokerage at scale. The protocol, which launched in September 2025, has already amassed **$300 million** in assets by unifying margin across disparate venues, starting with **Kamino** and its own P0 venue.

The core value proposition lies in capital efficiency for the yield-seeking investor. Currently, DeFi users face fragmentation—lending on one platform while borrowing on another requires over-collateralization at both ends. **Project 0** eliminates this by sitting as a layer above venues like **Drift**, **Jupiter**, and **Loopscale**. This architecture allows users to execute multi-venue strategies, such as carry trades (long spot, short perp) or basis trades, within a single margin account. With **Drift** integration slated for January and **Jupiter Lend** for early Q1 2026, the platform is positioning itself as the primary interface for complex, delta-neutral yield generation.

Peet also announced **Project 0 Pay**, a product launching in January that fundamentally rethinks crypto-to-fiat off-ramps. Unlike typical debit cards that liquidate assets at the point of sale, this infrastructure allows users to borrow against their entire yield-bearing portfolio to settle credit card bills (e.g., Amex or Chase) at the end of the month. This ensures investors maintain their exposure to assets like **Solana** and continue earning yield, rather than triggering taxable events or losing market position to pay for daily expenses.

Underpinning these products is **Brutus**, the protocol’s risk engine, which currently powers production variables for spot assets. A V2 upgrade next year will introduce fully dynamic, on-chain updates for LTVs and interest rates, extending support to derivatives. The roadmap culminates in the **Project 0 Token** launch in Q1 2026, contingent on the platform achieving majority market share among Solana lending venues—a milestone Peet expects to hit as the derivatives integrations go live.
